title: Jude Watson

'''Jude Watson''', the pen name of author '''Judy Blundell''', has written numerous ''[[Star Wars]]'' young-reader novels.

==Biography==
Jude Watson is an author specializing in the [[Rise of the Empire era|prequel era]] of ''Star Wars''. Watson became involved with [[LucasBooks]] when an editor she had worked with in the past selected her to write ''[[Star Wars Journal: Captive to Evil]]'' from the point of view of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. Since then Watson has penned the ''Star Wars: [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|Jedi Apprentice'']] series as well as journals for [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]] and [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]].

She also wrote the [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|''Jedi Quest'']] series, about [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his apprentice [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], as well as ''[[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi]]'' series, about [[Ferus Olin]] after the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].
